description: A large horizontal mural depicting a chaotic battle scene. An inscription above reads 'BRADSHAW'S DEFENCE OF MANCHESTER A.D. 1642.' The scene shows a violent confrontation at what appears to be a barricade or defensive position. Soldiers in 17th-century clothing fight with muskets, swords, and pikes. Figures tumble and fall in the foreground amid the confusion of close combat. A church with a tower is visible in the background at left. On the right side, additional figures and what appears to be a boat or barge suggest a waterfront setting.
